elements.title: lang::report_page_094_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_c.id,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       count(kbi_r.id)                                     as resources,
       GROUP_CONCAT(CASE
                      WHEN kbi_f.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/', kbi_ctx.id, '/mod_resource/content/', kbi_r.revision, kbi_f.filepath,
                                                        kbi_f.filename)
                      ELSE NULL END SEPARATOR '[[,]]') AS files,
       GROUP_CONCAT(kbi_f.filename)                        AS files_sorting,
       (SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT(kbi_u.firstname, ' ', kbi_u.lastname)
        FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
               JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_u.id
               JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
        WHERE kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_c.id
          AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
          AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
        LIMIT 1)                                       AS teacher
FROM mdl_course kbi_c
       LEFT JOIN mdl_resource kbi_r ON kbi_r.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'resource'
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id AND kbi_cm.instance = kbi_r.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 70 AND kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_cm.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_files kbi_f
         ON kbi_f.component = 'mod_resource' AND kbi_f.filearea = 'content' AND kbi_f.itemid = 0 AND kbi_f.filesize > 0 AND
            kbi_ctx.id = kbi_f.contextid
WHERE kbi_c.id > 0
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
GROUP BY kbi_c.id
